reasoning: The analysis identifies a high concentration of anomalies on the E2 interface. Applying the Metric Severity Prioritization heuristic, hard errors like packet loss and e2_du_retransmissions_ul_count are prioritized over performance metrics like latency. Causal graph analysis confirms a direct logical path from retransmissions to latency, and packet loss typically precedes retransmissions. While anomalies were seen on F1 and A1 interfaces, these were treated as symptomatic noise. The high severity and precedence of the uplink metrics isolate the failure to the E2 interface.
actionable_steps: 1. Inspect the physical and logical link stability of the E2 interface between the O-DU and the Near-RT RIC. 2. Check for configuration errors in the E2AP (E2 Application Protocol) or network congestion on the transport network carrying E2 traffic. 3. Verify the health of the E2 agent on the O-DU and the E2 termination point in the Near-RT RIC.
